description: Schema for interpretation binding entries. Each binding attaches a global registry interpretation (INT-XXX) to a specific structural construct found in a 41.x projection output. Binding is by reference — no projection content is altered.

binding_id.description: Stable binding identifier. Monotonically assigned within a binding file. Never reused.

source_type.description: The structural layer of the construct being bound.

binding_context.description: Optional: declares the specific field relationship within source_type. Example: 'embedded_pair_rule' when binding a zone_class that appears as an embedded pair rule entry rather than as the zone's own zone_class. Null when not applicable.

source_ref.description: Structural identifier(s) from the 41.x projection artifact. At least one non-null field required. zone_id fields are run-instance-specific; zone_class and signal_id and condition_id fields are global.

zone_id.description: PZ-NNN zone identifier from pressure_zone_projection.json. Run-instance-specific. Null when binding is purely class-level.

zone_class.description: Zone class identifier (e.g. COMPOUND_ZONE). Global. Null when not applicable to this binding.

signal_id.description: PSIG-NNN signal identifier. Global. Null when not applicable to this binding.

condition_id.description: COND-PSIG-NNN-NN condition identifier. Run-instance-specific suffix. Null when not applicable to this binding.

interpretation_ref.description: Reference to the global Interpretation Registry entry providing governed meaning for this binding.

registry_entry_id.description: The INT-XXX ID of the registry entry being attached.

registry_version.description: Version of the registry from which the entry was read at binding time.

attached_interpretation.description: Three-layer interpretation content copied verbatim from the referenced registry entry at binding time. Must be identical to the INT-XXX entry content. Consumers must not modify this content at consumption time.

behavioral_meaning.description: Verbatim copy of behavioral_meaning from the registry entry.

system_expression.description: Verbatim copy of system_expression from the registry entry.

business_expression.description: Verbatim copy of business_expression from the registry entry.

trace.description: Traceability record linking the binding to its registry source and projection source artifact.

registry_path.description: Path to the interpretation registry file from which the INT-XXX entry was read.

source_artifact_path.description: Path to the 41.x projection artifact from which the source_ref was derived.

evidence_status.description: Fixed status confirming that interpretation is attached by reference from registry only. Never 'inferred', 'derived', or 'computed'.

constraints.description: Invariant constraint flags. All must be false — none of these operations were performed in producing this binding.

truth_mutation.description: Confirms projection artifact source truth was not modified.

runtime_computation.description: Confirms no new computation was performed on projection values.

recommendation.description: Confirms no recommendation language was introduced.

severity.description: Confirms no severity labels were assigned.

prediction.description: Confirms no predictive claims were introduced.

extension_rules.new_binding: New bindings must be appended with the next BIND-NNN ID. IDs must not be reused or recycled.
extension_rules.update_binding: Existing bindings may be updated only if the referenced registry entry has been superseded and the binding is updated to reference the new INT-XXX ID.
extension_rules.deletion: Bindings must not be deleted. Deprecated bindings must be marked with a deprecation note referencing the superseding BIND-NNN or INT-XXX.
extension_rules.client_specificity: Bindings referencing zone_id fields are run-instance-specific. Bindings referencing only zone_class, signal_id, or condition_id are global. Both types are permitted in the same binding file.
